message:
fix(window,gui): eliminate Connection::get().unwrap() panics during shutdown

Connection::get() returns Option<Rc<Connection>> but was called with
.unwrap() in 9 sites across macOS window code, GUI frontend, terminal
window, and Lua scripting. These panic if invoked after the connection
is shut down — which can happen from Cocoa callbacks (appearance
changes, window close, dealloc) that fire during app teardown.

Fixed sites:
- window.rs: OpenGL create, enable_opengl async, appearance callback,
  window_will_close — all now use if-let/ok_or_else guards
- connection.rs: with_window_inner helper — returns error to promise
- termwindow/mod.rs: new() and config_was_reloaded — fallback to
  "unknown" connection name
- frontend.rs: MuxNotification::Empty and QuitApplication — skip
  terminate if connection already gone
- guiwin.rs: get_appearance Lua method — returns "Dark" as fallback

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
